name: disruptor
description: 12 agent skills for AI-driven software development, stitched into one gated idea-to-ship pipeline: 7w3 design, build-ready spec, executable architecture guardrails, tracer-bullet slicing, an honest review loop, a parallel MVP worker fleet, demo-stand QA and safe server deploy. Cross-agent skills format (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, opencode). No vibecode. Assembled by practitioners of @aostrikov_agents_chat.
